We did our pre wedding and wedding shoot with Lensmen Studio and the results were honestly beyond expectations. Team made the whole shoot feel very comfortable and natural. They guided properly during poses and captured many candid moments beautifully. The teaser video, drone shots and color grading looked super cinematic. Delivery was also smooth and the album quality felt premium. One of the best photography teams in Jaipur for sure.
